seoTitle: Summerland Point vs Sunny Corner — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Summerland Point and Sunny Corner. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Summerland Point vs Sunny Corner: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Summerland Point and Sunny Corner.
heading: Summerland Point vs Sunny Corner — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Summerland Point, New South Wales and Sunny Corner, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sunny Corner has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Summerland Point (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Summerland Point or Sunny Corner safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Summerland Point has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Sunny Corner scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Summerland Point scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Sunny Corner scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Summerland Point or Sunny Corner?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sunny Corner has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
